prompt.content: Return a non-executable LinguisticPlanDraft. Select every admitted requirement_id exactly once and only its declared capability_id. Dependencies may reference only admitted requirement IDs. Report ambiguous terms in unresolved_terms. Do not create task IDs, agents, trust, credentials, contracts, schemas, artifacts, or authority. Reference labels are unavailable.

{"request_text":"Coordinate the declared services for coastal flood response; preserve the specified data flow, evidence contract, and authority limits.","admitted_request":{"user_goal":"Coordinate the declared services for coastal flood response; preserve the specified data flow, evidence contract, and authority limits.","requirements":[{"name":"Capability 1","requirement_id":"direct_feasible-capability-1","capability_id":"direct_feasible-capability-1","input_modes":["text"],"output_modes":["json"],"required_trust_level":"standard","validation_contract":{"required_artifacts":["artifact-1"]}}],"required_artifacts":["artifact-1"],"context":{"case_index":1,"allowed":true}},"registry_snapshot":[{"agent_id":"agent-1","name":"Agent 1","service_endpoint":"https://agent-1.example/a2a","trust_level":"standard","skills":[{"name":"Capability 1","capability_id":"direct_feasible-capability-1","input_modes":["text"],"output_modes":["json"],"validation_contract":{"json_schema":{"type":"object"}}}],"input_modes":["text"],"output_modes":["json"]}]}
